nl_query: Show the ltree path and level for every question in Section A of the Data Structures paper.
failed_sql: SELECT q.path, q.level FROM question q JOIN question_section qs ON q.section_id = qs.id WHERE qs.name = 'Section A' AND qs.qp_id = (SELECT id FROM question_paper WHERE title = 'Data Structures') LIMIT 1000;
error: Validation failed (schema): Ambiguous column reference: 'id'. It exists in multiple tables (question, question_section, question_paper). You must qualify it with a table alias.
